parameters.query:
WITH tr AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.transcripts (discovery_call_id, source, language, curated_text)
  VALUES ($1::bigint, 'manual_paste', $2::text[], $3)
  RETURNING id, curated_text
), ctx AS (
  SELECT dc.opportunity_id, o.client_id, c.type AS client_type, org.name AS organization_name,
         org.industry, p.job_title
  FROM appdata.discovery_calls dc
  JOIN appdata.opportunities o ON o.id = dc.opportunity_id
  JOIN appdata.clients c ON c.id = o.client_id
  LEFT JOIN appdata.organizations org ON org.id = c.organization_id
  LEFT JOIN appdata.people p ON p.id = c.primary_contact_id
  WHERE dc.id = $1::bigint
), job AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.job_queue (kind, priority, payload, status)
  VALUES ('ai_extract', 3, jsonb_build_object('transcript_id', (SELECT id FROM tr)), 'running')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM tr)                  AS transcript_id,
  (SELECT curated_text FROM tr)        AS curated_text,
  (SELECT id FROM job)                 AS job_id,
  (SELECT opportunity_id FROM ctx)     AS opportunity_id,
  (SELECT client_id FROM ctx)          AS client_id,
  (SELECT client_type FROM ctx)        AS client_type,
  (SELECT organization_name FROM ctx)  AS organization_name,
  (SELECT industry FROM ctx)           AS industry,
  (SELECT job_title FROM ctx)          AS job_title;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Jestes asystentem metodyka CoAction. Na podstawie transkrypcji rozmowy discovery zwroc WYLACZNIE jeden obiekt JSON (bez markdown, bez komentarzy) o kluczach: client_goals (string[]), challenges (string[]), communication_situations (string[]), business_context (obiekt z industry, role, international_scope), participant_type (string), hypothesis_recommendation (jedno z: business_english, english_for_it, english_plus_skills, skills_only, mixed), missing_data (string[]), confidence (liczba 0-1).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Kontekst: klient ' + ($json.client_type || '') + ', branza ' + ($json.industry || 'brak danych') + ', stanowisko ' + ($json.job_title || 'brak danych') + ', organizacja ' + ($json.organization_name || 'brak danych') + '. Transkrypcja rozmowy: ' + $json.curated_text }] }) }}

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.transcript_id, $json.model, JSON.stringify(JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content)), $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.job_id, $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.client_id, $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.opportunity_id ] }}

={{ [ $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.job_id, ($json.error && $json.error.message) || $json.message || 'HTTP request failed after retries', $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.opportunity_id, $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.client_id, $node["Postgres: Zapisz transkrypt i kolejk\u0119"].json.transcript_id ] }}
